subcodes.title: Words spoken at Rue St. Didier 30 in Paris, 1913-02-07
subcodes.first_line: Last night a Hindu professor of music came to see me. He brought with him a musical instrument called the vina
subcodes.subjects: @music and singing, @symbolism, @spiritual transformation, @Manifestation of God as sun, @spiritual springtime, @oneness; unity of religion, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @progress and the continual ascent of material civilization
